Module com.code
Package com.models

Class Car

java.lang.Object
com.models.Vehicle
com.models.Car
All Implemented Interfaces:
Animateable
public class Car extends Vehicle
The Car class represents a car which is a type of vehicle. It extends the Vehicle class and provides a specific implementation for displaying the car and updating its speed label.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Car(int lane, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, int speedBefore, int speed)
    Constructs a new Car with the specified lane, color, speed before, and current speed.

  • Constructor Details

    • Car

      public Car(int lane, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, int speedBefore, int speed)
      Constructs a new Car with the specified lane, color, speed before, and current speed.
      Parameters:
      lane - the lane in which the car is driving
      color - the color of the car
      speedBefore - the speed of the car before the current speed
      speed - the current speed of the car

  • Method Details

    • displayVehicle

      public javafx.scene.layout.StackPane displayVehicle()
      Displays the car as a StackPane containing a rectangle and a label.

      This method creates a graphical representation of the car using a rectangle to represent the car's body and a label to display the car's ID and speed.

      Returns:
      a StackPane containing a rectangle representing the car and a label displaying the car's ID and speed

    • updateSpeedLabel

      public void updateSpeedLabel()
      Updates the speed label of the car.

      This method updates the speed label of the car to reflect the current speed. The label displays the car's ID and current speed.
